3174190.name: Karos - Endless performance
3174190.description:
There are many useful items in the Endless performance set that will improve your game. This set will allow you to enjoy the possibilities that the store offers. You will have a large amount of supplies at your disposal, as well as a timeless costume!

Please note that all items in the Endless performance set cannot be stored in a warehouse, nor can they be transferred to another player.

Remember that you can only buy the starter kit once.

The package includes:

Unique Dance Costume (Torso) (Eternal) (1 piece)

Unique Dance Costume (Legs) (Eternal) (1 piece)

Unique Dance Costume (Gloves) (eternal) (1 piece)

Unique Dance Costume (Boots) (Eternal) (1 piece)

Wings of Rest (eternal) (1 piece)

Lucky Ruby Pickaxe (12 hours) (1 piece)

Excellent Strength Potion (1 hour) (5 pcs)

Suit Effect:

You can choose one of two upgrade options:

Torso: Physical Attack +60, Critical Damage 0.1 \ Physical Attack +29 and Magic Attack +120, Critical Damage 0.1

Legs: Physical Defense +270 \ Magic Defense +100

Gloves: Physical Defense +50 and Critical Chance +6 \ Attack Speed ​​+7% and Physical Defense +50

Feet: Movement Speed ​​+20% and Physical Defense +50, Critical Damage 0.1 \ Damage Absorption (HP) +3% and Physical Defense +50, Critical Damage 0.1

When assembled together, the suit parts grant their owner additional power:

3 parts: Health Points +360 and Critical Chance +7.2;

4 parts: Attack power +12% in addition to the effect of 3 parts.

You can get the purchased set in the "Gifts" menu of the in-game store.
3174190.supported_languages:
俄语*, 德语*, 土耳其语*, 英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 法语*, 波兰语*, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西*, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
